title: Retroactive spawn-packet — constraint-solver library at wrkstrm-core
spawnVariantRationale: Matrix-solver verdict (MULTI between light/medium) → operator-judged lean answer for foundational typed-primitive package. Substrate-canonical wire format may later promote this to a typed SpawnPacketModel schema family; for now this `.su.json` carries the informal-but-structured shape.
violationAcknowledgment: Authored without invoking the canonical spawn-software-workstream prospectively. This packet is the retroactive substrate-doctrinal repair per [[deferral-is-drift-do-it-now]] applied at the workstream-record layer.

consolidatedFrom: private/universal/substrate/collectives/wrkstrm-core/private/cross/spm/constraint-solver (my initial wrkstrm-core placement, retired in favor of the parallel-session pure-function design)
additiveSurface: constraint-solver@wrkstrm-core.cli executable (axiom-promotion target realized; renamed 2026-06-05 per [[executable-naming-slug-at-org-dot-form]] — operator-attested 'constraint-solver-cli: this is not the right new way to name this: constraint-solver@{org}.cli'; library slug stays plain `constraint-solver` per library convention)

designTruth.knownGap: Recursion fixture omitted spawn-software-workstream-required as a constraint. The matrix-solver only honors the constraints the operator names; this gap is the substrate-doctrinal failure mode demonstrated.

ldtProofs.ldtProofRef: tests/constraint-solver-tests/ (all suites green via swift test)

maintenanceHandoff.supersessionPolicy: Backwards-compatible additive evolution. Breaking changes require new versioned package per [[preserve-prior-schema-versions]] pattern (constraint-solver-v002 etc.).

monitoringPosture: omitted-per-spawn-typed-primitive-light-variant — tests + downstream consumer compilation serve as the substrate-canonical regression surface
